title: MHT-CET CAP Round 1 Registration
description: Register and fill choices for CAP Round 1 on the State CET Cell portal.

title: CAP Round 1 Seat Allotment
description: First round seat allotment results published. Accept or freeze allotted seat.

title: Document Verification – ARC Centres
description: Visit ARC with original documents for verification after seat acceptance.

title: Institute Fee Payment Deadline
description: Pay admission fees at allotted institute to confirm seat.

title: CAP Round 2 Counselling
description: Choice filling opens for CAP Round 2 for vacant seats.

title: Hostel Admission Registration
description: Apply for government and private hostel accommodation through institute portal.

title: JEE Main Session 2 Result
description: NTA publishes JEE Main Session 2 results on jeemain.nta.nic.in

title: NEET UG Counselling Registration
description: MCC opens registration for NEET UG counselling on mcc.nic.in
